name: Base_Bounding_Full_Duty_Loss
description: Immediate collapse of SH outlet to failure target; nominal protection.

name: Base_Dynamic_Full_Duty_Loss
description: 1st-order SH outlet decay after full heating medium failure.

name: Partial_Duty_Loss_50pct
description: SH outlet decays to midpoint between normal and inlet temperature.

name: Slow_Heat_Collapse
description: Slow exchanger response due to thermal inventory / shell-side holdup.

name: Fast_Heat_Collapse
description: Very fast exchanger response; conservative than base dynamic.

name: Trip_Setpoint_Degraded
description: Lower trip setpoint leaves less margin.

name: High_TT_Lag
description: Sensor lag doubled (common-cause degraded response).

name: One_TT_Frozen_Normal
description: One of three sensors stuck at initial normal reading; 2oo3 still available.

name: One_TT_Stuck_High
description: One TT fails high; 2oo3 logic still possible but delayed sensitivity.

name: One_TT_Stuck_Low_Spurious
description: One TT stuck low; checks robustness of 2oo3 against spurious trip.

name: Logic_Solver_Delay
description: Trip voting decision plus logic solver adds 5 s.

name: Valve_Slow_Closure
description: Actuator / valve closes slower.

name: Valve_Deadtime_5s
description: Actuator deadtime before movement.

name: Valve_Fails_Partial_20pct_Open
description: Valve only closes to 20% open.

name: Valve_Stuck_Open
description: Valve never closes, worst protective failure case.

name: Equal_Percentage_Like_Closure
description: Non-linear closure shape for sensitivity screening.

name: High_Ethylene_Flow
description: Increased throughput reduces residence time but increases convective transport.

name: Low_Ethylene_Flow
description: Reduced throughput changes transport and thermal inventory response.

name: Low_Ambient
description: Cooler ambient reduces heat gain to pipe.

name: High_Ambient
description: Warmer ambient increases heat gain to pipe.

name: High_Wind
description: Higher air velocity raises external h.

name: Low_Wind
description: Quieter air reduces ambient heat transfer.

name: Thin_CS_Wall
description: Less downstream CS thermal mass.

name: Thick_CS_Wall
description: Higher downstream CS thermal mass.

name: Low_Initial_SH_Outlet
description: Processor already operating closer to trip limit.

name: StartUp_Cold_Metal
description: Initial pipe metal temperature colder than fluid due to startup / upset.

name: Delayed_Failure_Initiation
description: Heating-medium failure starts later in simulation.

name: Pressure_Low_Downstream
description: Lower downstream absolute pressure changes PR density and transport characteristics.

name: Pressure_High_Downstream
description: Higher downstream absolute pressure changes PR density and transport characteristics.

name: Combined_Worst_Credible
description: Fast collapse + high TT lag + logic delay + slow valve + low ambient + thin CS wall.
